title: ITC Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ITC Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ITC Hotels! We are hiring a Guest Relations Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
